questions.question: Passive negative uses be + {a1} + past participle.
The letters {a1} every day.
The windows {a1} during the storm.
The report {a1} yet.
The contract {a1} tomorrow.
This file {a1} without permission.
Question order in passive: {a1} the room cleaned?
Was the work done? Yes, it {a1}.
Wh-question in passive: Where {a1} the book found?
Correct the mistake: Does the letter written? {a1} the letter written?
Negative present passive: The office {a1} on Sundays.
Short answer: Are the tickets sold? No, they {a1}.
